ARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the cluster.

AvailabilityMode.description: Indicates if the cluster has a Multi-AZ configuration.

EngineVersion.description: The Redis engine version the cluster is running.

Name.description: The user-supplied name of the cluster.

NumberOfShards.description: The number of shards in the cluster.

TLSEnabled.description: A flag to indicate if In-transit encryption is enabled.
